pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build may fail to compile or run on JDK 11 if the compiler plugin relies on this property for source/target levels, or it may produce bytecode incompatible with the intended runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the removed javax.inject module in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.inject package was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code depending on it will fail to compile or run at runtime without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code depending on it will fail to compile or run at runtime without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta replacement.
